Full_Review: Friendly efficient staff and comfortable room
Bathroom very tired and floor tiles need re sealing and just all a little grimy Windows need sorting in the room I was in  Good location free wifi friendly helpful staff

The perception of the hotel on Booking com is one of a luxury fine dining hotel well thats how we perceived it from the pictures I should have got the hint when i reserved a table for dinner they said there was no need The hotel has a conference centre so is geared towards corperate guests My wife and i were vastly overdressed for dinner and looked out of place against the IBM delegates jeans and short sleeve shirt brigade   We loved the location in Greenwich could not be more centrally located Parking was good too Staff were very friendly and helpfull
Stairs tricky our nearest ones didnt go to the gtround floor it wasn t ckear until we got to the bottom   The location the view the friendly staff Good breakfast Great car park

The room was very hot the bathroom needed a good clean on the floor around the bath Everything in the room felt sticky the one chair was dirty For what we paid I would have expected better facilities Travel Lodges are the same standard but cheaper   Perfect location in Greenwich for everything Easy to walk to the shops restaurants museums the beautiful park We drove there was parking available The staff were very good we were able to check in very early
Parking is for a fee but good to have available Breakfast buffet at hotel is for a fee but places to eat are with walking distance so available choices   Excellent location

Poor check in process kept waiting for a long time and was in a hurry Not enough front office staff at a busy check in time This first impression reflects the overall feeling of the hotels efficiency  Location

The room was very warm so air conditioning would have been a bonus although there was a table top fan provided in the room The sink which was located directly behind the door of the bathroom was inconvenient It would have been nice if bathrobes and slippers were provided   The location is excellent for sightseeing and public transport and the parking in the grounds a real bonus given how difficult it is to find parking in the area

Bar prices 2 drinks 19 Hair dryer has no get up and go  Quiet hotel friendly staff great location for O2 Easy walk from DLR Cutty Sark station to hotel Comfy rooms big towels tea coffee facilities in room fan in room very much needed Nice toiletaries

Booking com stated that if there was parking available on the property it would be free Parking was available but we were charged 10 per night   The room overlooked an inner courtyard which made it quiet and peaceful

The location was perfect for us very close for our visit to the Royal Naval College for a concert Really near to the Thames and only about 5 minutes from the DLR station too Lots of places to go out and eat and the Thames is nearby too for a nice walk The hotel itself was a really outstanding building from the outside and the room was a decent size too and had everything we needed for our stay The staff were friendly and the breakfast was well stocked with plenty of variety and good service

No air conditioning It was very warm during stay only had a fan in the room The room was booked for a special occasion daughter s graduation but given a room looking out onto tops of buildings would have been nice if it had overlooked the beautiful gardens it was one of the reasons I booked the hotel Its location was ideal for Greenwich Uni as my elderly mum cannot walk very far   Beds were lovely very comfy Staff helpful
No air con Room very noisy with party outside and directly underneath Breakfast fairly poor standard and waiter attention poor  room reasonably furnished

Our room on the 4th floor was a bit small and without AC Would not recommend to take a room in 4th floor during summer time again too hot   Location location location We went for my wife s graduation at Greenwich University and enjoyed our stay at the hotel Used public transport for arrival visiting London and departure All easy going with bus station just in front of the hotel Recommend to visit Shooters Golf Club just 30 min away Great place

The room was very warm even with windows open and we didn t really want a fan on all night We were right opposite windows which meant we couldn t have daylight and privacy at the same time also people outside in area below windows could see if we didn t have curtains pulled or blinds down The armchair in the room was very badly stained   Staff were very friendly and helpful our room was clean a nice size and very comfortable as was the bed too The location is excellent and it s a beautiful building also the grounds gardens were lovely and well kept
Everything else fine But 6 for a bottle of sparkling water from the bar Really Good quality water should be available at a reasonable price especially when London water tastes as it does
They provided winter weight duvets 13 5 tog in midsummer when 4 5 tog would be normal We were much too hot even with window open   Location on the National Maritime Museum site

Room was over a party function room loud noise meant we had to request to be moved fortunately there was a spare room available and staff were helpful in moving us Bit disappointed that although we have stayed many times at this hotel there is no recognition other hotels are much more on the ball and although I don t want to be best mates with the reception an acknowledgement would be nice   Basic amenities good location

One small thing missing from the room was a hairdryer even though it said there would be according to the booking com page of the hotel   Breakfast was a good amount to get your day started with Staff was also very friendly and accommodating Will definitely come back
Vending machine removed from hallway which was a good idea to have as the bar did not have snacks or soft drinks   Good breakfast comfortable room clean great location
Very warm in halls Only adequate amenities No hand soap for washing Breakfast and coffee was very mediocre  Location and the ability to leave luggage stowed away Very professional and helpful staff

The room was so hot and the fan made an extremely obnoxious noise when we had it on We had trouble sleeping because of the heat   I really enjoyed the location and the staff was very friendly and helpful

There was a bad odour of stale mops or water at the top of the stairs when we turned the corner to walk along the corridor to our room Possibly coming from a storage cupboard for cleaning supplies   The bed was so comfortable and the view from our room took in the front view of the Hotel So central to the whole of Greenwich village Such a delightful setting with wonderful attractions literally minutes walk away We will be back

The blinds rattled against window frame when window was open making it noisy to sleep Only 2 tea bags in the room when we arrived in the afternoon so did not have enough to have tea in the morning this should have been filled with enough for us to have had a few drinks over our one night stay also little choice of drinks I e no hot chocolate   bed comfortable good size room good choice at breakfast

We were put in a disabled room which I couldn t understand why as this wasn t pre booked The bathroom wasn t very inviting and had an uneven tiled floor which I felt was unsafe for bare feet There was mould in the grouting and on the tiled floor We couldn t sleep at all as our room looked out onto the generator which kept us awake all night as it was so loud This was particularly annoying considering I had a six hour drive the following day The corridor leading to our room was extremely dirty and tired looking and didn t give a very good first impression when you got out of the lift Overall we were very disappointed and because of that we wouldnt return   Staff were friendly and breakfast was lovely

Rooms poor no air conditioning bathroom needs a good makeover cracked tiles no shower cap Very disappointed due to a fabulous location Breakfast not good Tables far to close together staff kept bumping into the table when moving between to clear other tables Bar food poor quality   The location and parking facilities were great

No air conditioning due to it being a listed building   Great location next to Greenwich Park and near to local market and the Cutty Sark Good links into London via train or boat Lovely Breakfast and very friendly staff

the only evening meal was served in bar on very small tables or one very low table food was cold sent back and was told that this hotel didn t have a microwave not what is expected of this standard of hotel  location excellent
The bed was very comfortable There was no air conditioning but they provided a fan which was great as it was very hot I thought it was good value for money
Stayed before and all good The only reason I haven t given it full marks for staff is that reception staff were quite surly and not very helpful in comparison to the waiting staff who were excellent

Location was very convenient for our night at the O2 arena Just a ten minute taxi ride away Lovely staff very helpful and friendly Even sorted us out some biscuits and hot chocolate when we returned late and just missed the complementary drinks snacks which were a nice touch they do put them away over night Had a lovely walk around Greenwich Park the following morning which is just a stone s throw from the hotel
Under staffed Poor bar service with the bar almost 1 2 cover in used glasses most table dirty with used plates and glasses employ a pot man   Great breakfast clean room

on 3rd floor room and corridor extremely hot but reception very helpful with window and came to investigate and check my concern which I really appreciated  reception staff excellent proactive location in Greenwich close to what I came for sense of history in building and park close by generally a good mood and spirit among staff which I liked

This hotel with beautiful fassade benefits from a gorgeous location The Living Room offers a warm cozy and comfortable ambiance with a nice bar Watermelon and pineapple smoothie are my favorite on the breakfast table In general they have old facility decent rooms friendly and helpful staff

The only thing I thought could have been better was the brightness on the TV   Staff were very welcoming friendly cheerful and helpful Dinner in the dining room was superb Room was nice and quiet really comfy bed spacious bathroom Great all round Will definitely stay again Excellent value for money

No air con but historic building and understandable Fan was available in room   Check in welcoming efficient and friendly from Esther room was clean comfortable and well equipped for a short stay Breakfast excellent with great buffet style choices and waiter with ponytail was a joy in the mornings Room service was excellent with an above average menu for this type of hotel Location perfect for me Would not hesitate to recommend or return

The lifts were busy The shower was over the bath having had a knee replacement it s harder to get in and out of   The beds were very comfortable It was good value for money as it included breakfast A fan was provided in the room The staff ver friendly and helpful

The Bathroom needs serious overhaul and update   Beds where really comfy and enjoyed a good nights sleep hair dryer iron etc was all available The only down side was the bathroom which could use a serious update black mold everywhere which gave it a very unclean feeling The Staff where lovely and very helpful Despite the bathroom I would use this hotel again as the location is superb and you are so close to so many things plenty to do and visit

Unhappy with the room we were allocated on arrival and had a word with Sean on reception the next morning He undertook to try and resolve the problem in a professional manner When we returned to the hotel later in the day we were delighted with his efforts Had a lovely room wine and cake in Greenwich for my husband birthday luggage moved and no effort had been spared We stay at the hotel on a regular basis and will continue to do so Congratulations and thanks to Sean always great when a person exceeds expectations Maggie and John Blackler

Problems checking in at first I was allocated a room that was already occupied then given a key card which didn t work Sandwich ordered from the bar was stale   Bedroom was light and relatively spacious with large desk Full sized bath with lots of space around the sink Attractive sash windows overlooking a grassed area and beehives The hotel is located in an former nurses hostel has retained some traditional character and is a pleasant size set out over three floors Friendly staff pleasant relaxed atmosphere comfortable quiet lounge In an excellent location next to the National Maritime Museum and other attractions and shops in Greenwich Generous buffet breakfast 10 per cent discount voucher offered off next stay Some background traffic noise but generally quiet at night

Generally good if I wanted to get picky the hall carpets are a bit grubby but I presume they take a lot of footfall traffic   The hotel is a beautiful historic building with many photographs and pictures explaining its original use The interior and the bathrooms are a little tired but the staff cleanliness and general ambience make up for that two fold Couldn t have wished for a better location to stay in Greenwich 5 minutes from the park and observatory and 5 minutes to the pier and shops Highly recommended

One of the lifts was broken The room and hotel was hot but the historic nature of the building I understand prevents too much modernisation But it isn t too inconvenient   Excellent breakfast comfy bed Perfect location Cooling fan in room Lovely location and genuinely historic buildings Right in the heart of Greenwich and easy access to the O2 arena

Had a meal in hotel restaurant which was busy and under staffed the staff were lovely and hard working but only two servers People were waiting along time between courses The food was very good when it arrived   Excellent hotel Hotel location excellent for the O2 just 15mins on bus Great restaurants within walking distance Great street food in market Lovely views and walks in parkland Breakfast excellent room excellent all very clean and quiet

Bar staff not good in serving people in the right order We were two ladies waiting to be served but had to wait around 15 minutes people were coming in and getting attended to before us not happy about that Only one person serving the evening we were there plus one who didn t seem to be doing anything Need to sort this out or customers will go elsewhere to have a drink   Excellent hotel with great facilities and good for O2 concert we were attending

The bed was extra comfortable we booked a table for dinner food was amazing shower was nice a powerful my view from the room was gorgeous bright Breen trees we absolutely loved it it s a shame we couldn t stay just alittle longer

Breakfast had the useual problem with a buffet as the food was not very hot and a long wait for the coffee to arrive For my sat nav the hotel was hard to find as its in a one way street but did get good direction when I rang recption Rather overpriced for its facilities  Very freindly staff carpark very handy and good room on the 3rd floor

Your parking charges were not evident from my booking although I do appreciate that it was there in the smaller print Previously you did not charge for this   This is our third stay here and we like particularly the comfort and the position of the hotel
Great location at Greenwich We loved the history of this area and De Vere Devonport House was a lovely place to stay for our short visit Comfortable clean room with breakfast provided

Nothing really   A nice hotel located in the centre of Greenwich with very friendly and helpful staff ideal for local visits and a short bus ride to the O2 arena with bus stops 2 minutes walk away An excellent buffet breakfast in all an ideal place to stay if your visiting the area

Exposed alcove edge and height of bed from the floor Not easy to see the hotel sign De Vere in the dark needs illuminating   The room was an alcove room on the top floor Meaning the window was a Dormer type So when you went to the bathroom if you weren t careful you d bang you head on the edge of the alcove Only other disappointment was the height of the bed My partner is only short and the bed was very high off the floor meaning that it was awkward getting in
concerned if you had a late arrival would you be able to find a space to park your vehicle  comfy bed electric fan to use fresh food great location customer service excellent

Overheated Reception staff distinctly offhand on arrival Buffet breakfast good but staff assumed we d gone so took away our coffee and tea while we were helping ourselves to the cooked food   Location quiet at night Very substantial price reduction

It was very hot in the room the windows do not open well in fact the window in the bathroom didn t open at all We had the fan on and it was still uncomfortably hot The hotel could do with a face lift   Good location

The hotel was easy to find and welcoming The room was clean and tidy but a little tired with the lampshades looking a bit worn but everything you needed was there and the beds were very comfortable Breakfast was plentiful and pleasant and with an 11 o clock check out breakfast didn t feel rushed We used the MBNA Clipper service from Cutty Sark to get in and out of the center of London and it worked really well as we had wonderful weather

Room was much too warm but opening the windows meant having the noise of the outside fans presumably for the air conditioning somewhere in the building all the time There was a wedding on so lots of guests were congregating by the only working lift making it awkward to get in at times also the noise from the disco was very loud into the evening The staff on reception were not altogether great   excellent location comfortable room and beds lovely breakfast too

Quite expensive which was made particylarly apparent as the discrepancy of room prices between guests was quite extreme  The location of the property was absolutely perfect scrumptious breakfast and the staff were very kind and helpful

The standard evening meal was disappointing We both wanted smoked salmon starter and it was off I had goats cheese but it was not hot and creamy My friend had 3 tempura prawns with no side salad or bread My main of chicken curry was just curry and rice No chutney poppadums naan or anything Very ordinary The tortellini again was mediocre Breakfasts were fine   The sat nav said we were there before we were but once we found it it suited our needs very well The staff were extremely helpful food was good and the whole area is very pleasant with lots of greenery around Relatively easy acces into London by the DLR or riverboat We have stayed in central London previously but this was convenient coming down by road from Norfolk and out of the hustle and bustle of the city We ll definitely stay there again and a pub just down the road for a good meal

Because I d added my daughter s and granddaughter s name to one of the rooms there was a problem checking in but it was sorted out eventually   The rooms and accommodation were adequate for our needs good breakfast and not bad value for money for London

Bathrooms need an update and some of the decor is a little tired   Very welcoming staff Beautiful old building Great location Great variety of produce for breakfast Ability to request the bedroom we are comfortable in

Nothing really we were very impressed with our first stay at this hotel  The location of the hotel was just great we could easily walk to all that Greenwich had to offer and the hotel facilities and staff were excellent We will certainly return to this hotel in future

We understand from the hotel that the building is listed which restricts the amount one could open the windows but to have been able to have had the windows open a little more would have been good   Breakfasts were very good plenty of fresh fruit and a variety of other food in addition to the cooked breakfast all well laid out and easy to find The staff were very friendly and most helpful We also liked our room which was very quiet
The bathroom was a little frayed around the edges in some respects and could do with a little refurbishment soon   Comfortable room good location didn t check out the other facilities

We have stayed there three times and will return because of the location However we have always found the reception staff very unfriendly answering phones before dealing with customers at the desk On one occasion a staff member saw me approach the desk and she left her seat and went into an inner office while we waited at the desk She did not return for several minutes   Location and facilities suit us very well

Location was excellent and the rooms were larger than you usually get in London only problem was that the duvets were extremely thick and as such were far too hot for May We did have a couple of issues but the staff got them resolved immediately Would certainly book again

The sink in the bathroom didnt work and although we reported it straight away it was not resolved during our stay and was extremely inconvenient Unfortunately because we had not booked directly with the hotel but Booking com the Manager was unable to offer a refund on the bill only a discount voucher on our next visit As that is unlikely we received no recompense for the inconvenience experienced   Hotel is ideally placed to explore Greenwich

Understaffed bar in the evening The poor bartender Ricardo was left to serve over 100 wedding guests by himself The guy had a great attitude though and was a credit to the hotel Just a shame it took over 90 minutes for some of the supervisors to come and assist him only once he d run out of glasses and draught beer Bar prices are very high 13 for a pint of beer and a medium white wine is steep even by London prices It s a De Vere not the Savoy and when you consider it was understaffed too it was disappointing Staff were rushed off their feet at breakfast and we had to wait a long time just to get a tea coffee   Great location in central Greenwich We managed to get parking on site though it is limited The receptionist kindly gave us 2 hours extra for free the next day too Room was nice and spacious everywhere was clean Friendly helpful staff just poorly managed with no communication and organisation apparent Food at breakfast was good

Fact due to various reasons I could not get an evening meal on the 30th April I was asked did I book Apparently they had some special offers on I complained as the same thing happened at Breakfast on the morning of the 1st May I could not get a breakfast I told them that Residents must be told and be provided with a Booking time by the Hotel so as to be able to eat This spoilt my second visit to this Hotel   The restaurant evening meal is excellent

There was nothing to dislike It is an old building so if you don t like traditional decor and sash windows and you are looking for modern then bear it in mind Probably could use a refresh but great for us   Really good breakfast and very comfy bed
Staff quite rude and grumpy and breakfast both days was poor Cleaners very noisy each morning from 8am onwards so no chance of a lie in   Great location and bedroom was good

Quite strict rules about breakfast we had to leave early Saturday morning 15 mins too early for the starting time of breakfast 7 30 and we couldn t get a croissant and coffee to go before The room had single glazing and was on a courtyard therefore it was a little noisy   Great location just one 1 walking to the park staff was friendly and helping

The customer service was impeccable It is a long time since I have received service like this in a British hotel Your staff are wonderful We went out for a run early to be greeted on our return by a doorman proffering a bottle of water and fresh towel

Although the room was supposed to be suitable for people with disabilities the shower arrangement was quite wrong for Peter Impossible for him to climb into the bath for a shower Also toilets for disabled people need to be higher than usual Our toilet was quite low though the rails at the side were just right   Staff excellent very helpful Bed very comfortable room quiet Excellent communication before our visit due to my husband s particular needs

Tiles around bath tub were crumbling and in need of replacement Room was the smallest and most cramped I ve ever experienced at the Devonport Not enough room to position the guest chair so that tv could be viewed Very sad that the Devonport does not have rooms to accommodate all my relatives and myself for my son s wedding this June 13 19 so have had to book my family group into the Ibis rather than being able to introduce the positive Devonport experience to relatives   Everton the breakfast manager is the primary reason I ve stayed at the Devonport 6 times in the last four years He is so exuberant and friendly and always remembers me Also the property has no surprises and feels like my home whenever I visit Front desk operations were the best this trip ever Previously confusion was the operating style at the front desk with communication skills with guests and among staff being poor a refreshing Improvement this trip

The only toiletries were shower gel No hairdryer Only used the bar once as the barman kept pouring the drinks flat and at 5 a pint this lack of training was disappointing   Lovely historic building Excellent location for visiting Greenwich landmarks and for access to the Thames transport links

Having to pay gor car park Price should include parking as we were guests of the Hotel It is an extra cost and would be an extra incentive to chose the Hotel IF free parking was included We had a nice room but we were not told that it was directly over a Wedding Disco Maybe reserving the room for Wedding Guests would have been appropriate However this did not spoil our overall stay for the 3 days   Liked the location Staff and breakfast

Decor and room and hotel in general the decor was dated overall In our room 103 worn out bathroom floor tiles broken and cracked toilet roll holder was too close to the toilet practically sat on it the blinds were water stained and split and broken the tiles and grout awfully dirty carpet old and worn in places The bed was cumfy but the pillows were flat and well used wardrobe handles missing 2 nights 596 not cheap   Thought your staff were excellent reception restaurant staff and room staff all excellent

We had a twin room and The beds had casters on unfortunately the beds were only held in place by gravity hence if you sat up in bed and put your back on the headboard the bed rolled across the room good fun but not practical although it did give us a few laughs Tip if you intend to read in bed put the lounge chair at the bottom of the bed problem solved   Our room was bright and quiet

The beds were very comfortable and although we were in the centre of Greenwich it was very quiet Also we were a little worried that because there was a wedding reception at the hotel we wouldn t be able to get any sleep but the band finished at exactly midnight which ensured we got slept well
windows only open about two inches the room was to warm however there is a portable fan   location excellent for all of greenwich really good breakfast

Room had a sloping roof not brilliant for a tall man Double bed was dreadful Mattress at some stage had been stored on its side as a result it was misshapen and uncomfortable to lie on   Very central for Observatory parks museums Cutty Sark etc Good choice of local restaurants cafes Good breakfast

Was expecting the a la carte menu which is still on the website instead was only a limited set menu Also dessert described as a fruit trifle contained only fruit jelly no fruit   Secluded relatively quiet location excellently located adjacent to the Greenwich museums good sized room and bed well furnished Pleasant restaurant and bar Very comprehensive breakfast Convenient car parking at reasonable cost for London

The temperature of the room was too hot and no air conditioning Plus there was no fridge and the tv was small Overall a decent hotel but nothing wow  Staff seemed friendly enough and accommodating by holding our bags after check out
a couple that we were with had to change rooms because the room had stains on the bedding and the carpet looked as if someone had been ill on it The room was generally not very clean

Room was too warm even with the small window open The restaurant was too cramped which made it tricky to move from table to the servery The bathroom could do with a refurb   Good location Easy car parking Good breakfast

the beds are quite firm but that is just a personal choice as I have quite a soft mattress at home The room got really warm at night so don t forget to crack a window   Staff were really friendly and helpful both when we got there and during breakfast It was a great location for getting to the o2 we talk a walk along the Thames path in the morning to get to our event and it was lovely just under 2 miles As a bonus we were right by the Cutty Sark Lots of places to eat and drink nearby too Breakfast was good nice choice of hot and cold and the coffee tasted great

Incident with room but addressed well by hotel  Staff very professional in manner and personality Food plentiful and quality Had issue with our room the night staff offered to move us straight away 3 30 am very pleasing gesture however decided to move after breakfast as not to disturb other guest but well done to night staff Would definitely stay here again
I found the bed a bit uncomfortable but I m quite fussy The room was also quite hot at night but I didn t feel comfortable leaving the window open   How spacious the room was The bathroom was lovely

The curtains The pillows the curtains didn t close properly and the pillows we found rather lumpy ok that s personal opinion   The location of the hotel is excellent right in the middle of peaceful park gardens but close to all the amenities and visitor attractions Excellent breakfast

Breakfast is far too expensive Get the same thing half price in a number of local places   Great location and good rates for London Lots of history with the building and located next door to the Maritime Museum and Greenwich park If you re going to the O2 Arena it is 5 mins from Greenwich pier where you can get the river bus No traffic no queues bonus

Excellent full English breakfast and comfortable bed Nice view onto the park in front of the hotel towards the Cutty Sark Relax in the evening with a good pint of beer in the officers mess in a comfy chair

Breakfast food offering was rather ordinary Ate out on the third day as couldn t face the same selection again Porridge only offered on one day Had to ask for it the second day but no additions offered e g Dried fruit and honey Fruit offering included tinned fruit and a fresh fruit salad which was about 90 apple   Peaceful location Prompt check in and checkout Breakfast staff in the restaurant
Room was scruffy with mouldy and broken tiles in the bathroom Noise from the air conditioning plant outside the room was excessive Carpet dirty with stains   Breakfast was very good

Can t think of anything Just perfect   The room was very pleasant Bed extremely comfortable Breakfast very enjoyable and good selection of fresh food Greenwich lovely place to explore and so much to see and do Bus stop right outside Who could ask for more

Could be more tourist information available Reception have maps but need to ask   Ideally situated for museums and Cutty Sark Easy to get around by water bus on the Thames buses and train station nearby too Only one stop to the O2 for concert Quiet location very close to gardens and Greenwich Observatory and museums Good choice for breakfast wonderful yogurt and fruit pot and selection of cooked buffet food
Too be honest was a superior room but would have the same facilities in a travel lodge The only real difference was parking and location   Can not fault the location and parking facilities

Bathroom definitely needs to be refurbished but was fully functional   Bedroom was spacious if a little tired Breakfast selection was excellent though the coffee could have been a little hotter Good service from hotel staff thanks

Nothing   Central location in Greenwich with car parking at 10 per day which was good for London Beautiful grounds and plenty of places to eat and drink in the area Plenty of choice for breakfast and tasty sausages We were visiting Excel and it was easy to get to would definitely stay here again Used the river taxis to get to central London a more relaxed trip than the underground Love Greenwich

Old hotel in need of major renovation to make it worthy of its fabulous location Total disappointment that a hotel in such a historic site was in need of update and essentially shabby Also it bills itself as a conference center but the facilities were poor Nothing worked in the way a true business professional needs them to Has the potential to be so much better but no one has bothered   Superb location in a beautiful and historic part of London
Plastic Loo seat I ll fitting taps need rescale Curtains didn t quite close  Location staff food fantastic Only let down was ill fitting curtains and bathroom needed maintenance

The breakfast was not up to the standard expected in a hotel with this starring Croissants were small hard and cold possibly stale The whole place needed a good renovation and overhaul as it just looked tired and a bit shabby in the public areas The bathroom in our room had a smashed floor tile and the washbasin was cracked   The location was superb This lovely old building was situated in the heart of Greenwich and within a comfortable walking distance of everything we had come to see Royal Observatory National Maritime Museum etc
Bed a little hard Card needed to be reset twice to use lift   Room was warm and comfortable Breakfast was really excellent Loved the lounge area with coffee available and bag storage

Windows draughty I know its prob listed but was chilly   Size of room helpful and approachable reception staff good breakfast selection and quality Went to concert at 02 great location Will come back def

Bar ran out of snacks peanuts crisps etc Asked for room service which certain items were marked as being 24 hours advised nothing available as kitchen was closed   Pleasant hotel lots of hot water clean sheets and towels Great location for visiting Greenwich
Satisfactory experience all round if a bit on the pricey side of my usual budget   Warm welcome from staff Assisted when required in demonstrating how to turn on heating Replaced faulty lamp quickly

Stray pubic hair in the bathroom when we arrived but otherwise very clean   Location was excellent Tea included two peppermint tea bags which is rare compared to othe hotels I have stayed in normally only breakfast tea

Nothing to complain about   Loved the beautiful spotless room overlooking the grounds to the front Really comfy bed it was an effort to get up for breakfast but having stayed there before we knew how good the breakfast is and didn t want to miss that Always stay here when we are going to the O2 and like to travel to the O2 by the river boat which is a 5 minute walk away Relaxing clean hotel with really friendly staff
Car parking is easy particularly for Greenwich which can be busy with visitors Visited several times and always possible to get space and at fair price for guests
Breakfast is very poor of choice one of the worst I ve seen Bathrooms are a bit old   Location is really good close to the museums and the park
Nothing  Just love it all Having made the mistake last year choosing a cheap and cheerful en route to Disney discovered Greenwich and won t look back now

Rooms are nice and clean Location is amazing Got married at the Naval College next door Staff was super helpful on the morning as I was getting ready taking the stylist up to my room sorting out our bags and allowing for late check out so I could start hair and make up before heading to the venue when it opened Wonderful breakfast buffet Special shout out to Esther at reception who made everything s run smoothly Couldn t expect more

Sandwich in the bar came with nothing no serviettes sauces or salt peppernot even butter plenty of ham and cheese but that was it bread ham cheese I know it was late could not eat poached eggs on Fri morning full of vinegar breakfast better Saturday morning  Location
The bed was too firm for 2 old crocs with bad backs memory foam toppers as an option would have made the stay perfect   The staff were always smiling and helpful
Tatty around the edges bathroom window peeling and no fan in bathroom Very small rooms   Great location for O2 and central London Great to park in front of hotel for a reasonable price

Beds were very small narrow very high and very uncomfortable Got no decent sleep for 2 nights and woke up every 2 hours due to the awful beds Went home for a rest Bill was overstated and I was charged for room service I did not order items on bill made no sense and were unrelated to what I ordered very misleading Hotel had a cold and uncaring atmosphere Residents were subjected to 8 hours of TV Sport on Saturday and there was also sport on the radio at the bar 50 yards away playing in counter harmony to that on the TV Awful There was hardly ever anyone on the bar to provide drinks or information to guests and you had to go looking for someone each time you wanted something  Location was very close to Observatory shops and restaurants

Small negative had to ask for shampoo Not a problem as believe in saving on plastics but would have been good to know about having to request in advance   Great location in Greenwich and short walk from Cutty Sark DLR station Asked for a quiet twin on the top floor and got a large corner room on the top floor at end of several halls Did not mind the distance from the lift as large rectangle building since room dimensions were generous Ironically there were others in that hallway as one could hear voices through the room doors but luckily this old building has thick walls so once in the room it seemed ok Also great that windows actually could be opened

BBC1 not available on TV in lounge very disappointing as we wanted to watch England v Wales Rugby match Bedding although clean and soft did have a hole in it and duvet was much bigger than cover and seemed a bit tired No Fridge shampoo or body lotion just shower gel   Comfy bed clean room

The restaurant is disappointing Limited choice which can indicate fresh local cooking The menu is VERY limited if you have an allergy which doesnt indicate local cooking Not up to the standard of the hotel Its a bit of a maze and security locks on lift and stairwell doors are annoying when you have your hands full   Beautiful character and historic property in quiet location in the heart of Greenwich close to many good restaurants Reserved but professional staff are helpful there is parking on site and good wifi

Room was cold and windows were breezy No air conditioning had to turn the radiator up Bed side lamp didn t work Room was small and had brown and orange dated decor looked nothing like the pictures on the website Paid more money than a premier in and this was far worse   We were able to check in early Location was good to get to the o2 Short bus journey away

After at least a dozen visits to this hotel we never seem to appear on their database as regular customers   Central position to Greenwich and direct access to London city centre Competent management and friendly staff

Room was located on 1st floor over a Conference Room which was very noisy with music first thing in morning Was woken to Star Wars theme music blasting at 7 30am someone was checking the facilities were working apparently Request room away from Conferencing Centre   Location is very good handy for all attractions and transport links
That cleaner knocked door at 9 30 am To ask if we had finished Check out is 11am At least wait till 10am or check at reception who has checked out Felt harassed to leave   Location location x

There was nothing they would have had improv d upon   I had told the hotel by email that this was a 21st treat for my son and his girlfriend The two were blown away by the effort the hotel put into welcoming them and recognising the occasion They loved their room and the surprise of a Happy Birthday Cake Thank you so much

The food which was part of the deal was disappointing Breakfast was adequate but watery yogurt in a jug tasteless melon dry croissants The evening meal was mixed both soup and risotto were too salty Too little care taken Though the service for both breakfast and dinner was good   Brilliant location for views across the river and access to river and rail transport into London Right next to Maritime Museum and Greenwich park Comfortable room recently furnished and decorated Pleasant staff

Room could have been a bit warmer This is likely not a big deal for most of the year I visited in a cold spell in January A warm shower really helped   Wonderfull staff very responsive nice and clean with a modern appeal Great restaurants all around

Breakfast selection is good but could have been hotter croissants not the best Our bathroom could have done with a face lift Single glazed windows still allow noise from road to spoil mornings   The location is excellent plenty of transport links but also plenty to do in Greenwich great market shops and eateries plus some very interesting pubs The hotel is good too very close to the park a walk in is not to be missed especially for the view of London from near the Royal Observatory at the top of the hill
Bathroom and bedroom carpet looking worn TV a bit small for me   Location is fine once you know but satnav can take you the wrong way Beware Bathroom ours was looking a bit tired but shower was good
Didn t get a wink of sleep Door outside keeps banging and there were lots of heavy footsteps upstairs  Location was great and perfect for us as seeing a gig at the o2
Lovely friendly staff spotlessly clean cosy rooms great breakfast great location and boat ride into the city excellent value for money I ll be staying here regularly

There wasn t really anything I didn t like It was a little more expensive than I m used to but then the convenience for access to Royal Museums Greenwich is superb   The room was spacious beds comfortable and the bathroom very well equipped
Evening meal set menu was disappointing no a la carte menu on offer   Very convenient location for Greenwich and surrounds south side of London Transport links a bonus

We had requested early arrival times and a cot for one of our rooms however we arrived later than planned but the rooms still weren t ready and that was after checking with Booking Com that everything would be ready The cot was in extremely poor condition and too dangerous for us to put our Grandson in We reported the fact to the desk but nothing was done about it We are waiting to hear from management about that issue The shower areas could do with a anti mould and mildew remover in our room anyway There needs to be a sign post directing you to the car park at the rear of the hotel as it took a bit of searching for that s not really a complaint   We loved the location for us it was perfect The rooms were comfortable not massive but fine for our requirements The gardens are a bonus especially for the little one to run around safely There is a very useful business suite with computers and Tea coffee available on tap The hotel is next door to the Maritime Museum and a few minutes from the Cutty Sark If you like history then this is the place to stay The underground is just a short walk not clearly signposted there are the ferry boats and river cruises a stones throw away You can use Oyster cards on the trains busses and some ferries The O2 is just 2 miles up the road So a thumbs up

No fridge or safe in room as we stayed for couple of nights it would have been preferable  Lovely hotel excellent parking facilities location was absolutely great staff so helpful we will definitely use again the icing on the cake literally as it was our wedding anniversary they had put some lovely muffins on a plate decorated on chocolate with Happy Anniversay such a wonderful gesture really appreciated

Slightly wider range of tea coffee in the room could include hot chocolate and biscuits Room too hot but was able to adjust   Location very good for museum pier and village Hotel parking very good Very helpful pleasant staff room clean

The chef managed to decorate the smoked salmon with the lemon posset pudding rather than the lemon mayo which made an interesting starter Hallway carpets look as if a good shampoon might be in order but rooms fine   Fantastic location during tube strike We were going to boat show which was accessible via the DLR Dockland Light Railway
The bathroom was a bit dirty but I think that was because it needs to be updated   The staff were all very helpful and friendly The breakfast was really good

Staff were fabulous very busy in the bar on the friday as there was a wedding and a conference but all served with a smile No atmosphere on the Saturday it was very quiet but we were out so it made no difference to us The location was fabulous right at the entrance to greenwich park opposite the naval college and a 5 minute walk from cutty sark station Loads of lovery bars and restaurants a stones throw away We will be back
The room was small it was extremely warm and couldn t open the windows   The Location was brilliant The Hotel itself was immaculate The staff and the booking in process was the best I ve experienced

The rooms are quiet dated and the beds arent the most comfortable They also move   The building is in a great location which is close enough to the inner city with the added luxury of Greenwich park and shops The staff were helpful and tried to resolve things quickly Our room had a small infestation of ladybirds and my partner requested a new room which they changed promptly

Nothing at all as all good Friendly staff very good breakfast and bar meals were excellent too   Liked the area very much within walking distance to the Markets Observatory Queen s House Picturehouse Theatre and more great location
I suffer with arthritis and it has been proven that hard beds are not good for bad backs although the bed was comfy at first feel it was much too hard for me  It was all great

There was no wow factor in the rooms They were very utilitarian with drab dated decor   The location and views were nice The breakfast was lovely but for the price of the room breakfast should have been included

Being in the heart of Greenwich I suspect that this wonderful building is Grade 1 listed This means that the windows are single glazed and on occasions there can be traffic noise in the rooms that face the main road It s worth remembering that parking is extra In this day and age it is fairly normal for better hotels to have rooms fitted with safes but not here Some of the rooms have been updated and I suggest that you ask for one of these if you intend to visit   This hotel is in a wonderful location the staff always keen to help especially Tim and the discounted breakfast is good value for money

It would be preferable to inform customers that the restaurant is closed due to a function possibily by email so that the customer can make an informed choice about whether the hotel is suitable for their needs
Staff were unhelpful and had to ask numerous times for a hairdryer It s too expensive for what you get but it was in my old neighbourhood and that s why I booked   location

We only stayed for 1 night and found nothing to complain about   Breakfast was really nice with good choice and the staff were very helpful The location was great too only 5 min walk from the station Hotel was spot on for what we wanted

The rooms were basic and in desperate need of decoration Extremely dark and dowdy and sparsely furnished with what looked like odd 2nd hand furniture There was mould in the grouting of the tiles in the bathroom and ingrained dirt and staining around the edges of the bathroom floor It was superficially clean We had been upgraded to a superior room when we arrived I dread to think what our original room would have been like The windows were single glazed and did not fit well therefore the traffic disturbed our night It certainly wasn t four star standard and not worth the money We have stayed in better budget hotels which are cheaper We are not normally picky but we were very disappointed and would not stay there again or recommend it   The location was very good for accessing places of interest in Greenwich and the staff were quite nice
Tired and a bit shabby decor marks on curtains noisy needs soundproof ceiling bathroom shower basic Expensive 159 no BF   Great location next to park and museum easy access by bus to O2 for our gig
Nothing  Room was a decent size clean comfortable with everything you need Excellent location right next to the Greenwich Park Museums area Really excellent value for money in London

There were no hooks on the doors to hang towels etc no biscuits on the tea tray but overall great location good value parking and very helpful friendly staff  Breakfast too expensive so went out which was lovely

If I m being picky some cracks around the windows which let in a bit of a draft but the heating corrected that Perhaps a little updating needed e g Taps looked a bit tired and old but this did not detract from a very pleasant stay   Staff were excellent friendly and couldn t do enough to help Rang them as I was running late and asked them to arrange a taxi which they did and then rang me back to confirm and inform me the taxi may be a little delayed due to local traffic congestion Very helpful and informative

Staff attitude was dreadful It is run down Has a cheap and uncomfortable Bar In addition Booking com let us down and when I turned up at the hotel my booking for 5 rooms was not recorded even though I had an emailed acknowledgment Poor performance by both the Hotel and Booking com   Needed to be in the area for a function Good location

Nothing   Easy walk from mainline station Very helpful and friendly staff The manager was particularly helpful and proactive Great credit to the hotel Hotel felt very safe and secure for a single traveller Hotel very well situated with wide selection of bars restaurants and attractions within easy walking distance Walking directions were very easy to follw Would most definatetely stay here again
Dinner in room on night of my arrival was not nice Ordered breakfast in my room for following morning It never arrived Wifi was not usable No bottled water in rooms  Bed soft but comfortable

I think for the price breakfast could have been included also the tray in the room could have included a bottle of water and perhaps some biscuits like most other places nowadays We got back to the hotel at twenty past midnight and wanted drinking water We asked at reception if we could get a bottle to be told it cost 6 and they would have to charge 5 room service On the plus side we were told that there was a water dispenser on one of the floors that was free So was all good in the end We were in room 312 which had a generator or something outside the window so was a little bit noisy With the windows closed it was ok but wouldn t be so good in the summer   Great location Lovely building Nice staff Good sized room comfortable bed Nice shower

The towels were rough and there wasn t any robes which I like to pop on after having a bath and then getting ready to go out for the evening the windows were a little drafty and the radiator was making a funny noise but had to have it on as the temp outside was freezing and the tea and coffee facilities were 1 milk each and that s it so wasn t able to have more than 1 and when you come in freezing after walking around the markets you need a nice hot drink and then another one in the morning   The location was amazing and the view from our window was fantastic had a brilliant nigh night out in Greenwich hotel looks beautiful and grand
Reception staff member announced that I had a reduced rate room which I didn t think was appropriate nor relevant  Fantastic old building in a great location Room was very comfortable

Room was very dated still very good value   Location is excellent so close to Cutty Sark the Royal Park and the town Centre Plenty of bars and restaurants at various prices The hotel staff very friendly go the extra mile to help

The room price I paid 214 for accommodation which on a previous occasion I had had for 115 Booking com or the H tel Are scoring big   Staff were cheerful and helpful Food was of a good qauality at dinner and breakfast

Was not clear on website whether breakfast was included and then what how to order if it was not   Clean spacious rooms Ideal situation Good breakfast
Location was great although a little far out if you want to explore central London However public transport is really close Room big comfortable and very clean Great value for money Breakfast lovely

Not sure the Breakfast was value for money pastries a little dry and quite a costly breakfast for what was on offer   Location of the hotel was perfect for our trip to the O2 and into London We walked to the O2 and took the boat into London Size of room perfect for sharing with my Mum Cleanliness fantastic and staff very attentive and friendly

a bit of noise from different groups conferencing on the same floor Roomservice had an incomplete menu and it took long to arrive  The atmosphere the hotel is superb

Over heated over night Breakfast expensive No fridge in the room always buy fresh milk for our coffee dislike the small containers provided in hotels That our car was damaged when parked in the car ark outside the hotel No way to find out by whom   Proximity to tourist sites Ease of walking everywhere Rooms a good size

Room service especially Laundry was slow and I had to chase up my garments and also I was delivered someone else s suit No Fridge in room I am a diabetic and could have done with a fridge to keep my insulin cool  Location was excellent

Sadly no stool or other dedicated suitcase stand   Room and bathroom WITH BATH very pleasant Ideal for a short stay for a longer stay might be worth checking out better rooms Staff very helpful courteous and friendly Breakfast wide variety
The hotel was lovely attended a wedding just would of like semi skimmed cartons in the room and most people don t have full fat and a sweetener choice

Very nice decent price for a hotel in London Around a 45 minute journey into the centre of London Hotel staff made it simple and easy to check in out

The window could be opened for fresh air and the beds were very comfy The room had a high ceiling which gave a good sense of space and the room was attractive and functional

Mold on the windows bathroom ventilation Mold around the bath unstable wifi  The breakfast staff Great start to the day one guy was like a ray of sunshine

Really awful hotel more like a hostel than a hotel the reception has a distinct pong that smells like an old drunks bad aftershave The rooms are seriously tired and heavily used the bar and restaurant lack any character a typical London hotel from the 80 s under invested and over priced  Location and staff were really good

Bathroom a bit tired Ordered a sandwich with room service rang after an hour as it had not arrived Had been sent to wrong room Bread very dry when it reached us obviously had been hanging around until we queried non arrival were given the two juices free Ordered a morning paper which did not arrive had to mention when paying so it was not charged   Great location Comfortable beds Good breakfast Excellent parking at a great price but limited spaces so get there early Were able to extend parking so we could go into London the next day SO useful
Noisy wedding one night obviously not hotels fault need more organization at Breakfast when busy  Central Greenwich and lovely building Staff very helpful

Asked for a twin room which we received but it was designed for wheelchair user which we are not so basin in bathroom was too low Such a person would have found it difficult to get in to the bath with shower overhead even though there were some grab bars and it felt very dicey Have previously eaten in the restaurant which had a good menu at one time now reduced to set menu with three poor choices although we were able to have the bar menu ok but basic There was no one else in the restaurant at 8 30 on a Saturday which says it all really Breakfast was fine though on the expensive side if not included in the room rate at nearly 16 per head ok if you want a big blowout I suppose Overall it feels like De Vere are trying to cut costs at this hotel I was alarmed by some powder put down in our corridor before we left looks like some kind of infestation had broken out   Room was clean and staff were helpful and polite

Rooms can get hot there was a fan in our room but the windows don t open enough to cool the rooms down If there is a wedding on the guests can be loud if they spill outside depending on your room location   Excellent Location which is very quiet at night Room and bath room was Clean and facilities were good although rooms are starting to show age Wi Fi signal was first class and was over 10Mbit

For the price breakfast should be included Also the bathrooms are not exceptionally clean toilet was left dirty and there are brown marks in the grouting around the bath Room refreshment facilities are very basic   Location is excellent staff very helpful and polite

Poor workmanship in the ensuite but the room was great   Friendly staff and the that it is so near to the centre the Cutty Sark the Fan museum the Maritime museum Great location

No air conditioning There was however a fan supplied in the room   Excellent friendly staff especially at reception All request were met with a smile I liked the location especially as we had super weather Despite a lot of scaffolding on adjacent buildings we were not disturbed

Sadly the property was severely let down by the fact that the rooms and bedroom hallways were like saunas no air con The windows barely opened This led to a very poor nights sleep made worse by our room being overrun with wasps whom were trying to attack the sluggish dying bees from the hives on the ground below The livestock is natural and nothing can be done about it but despite the provision of a room fan which sadly just blew the boiling hot air around if there had been air con units you would not have had to open the windows which let the wasps in The provision of a fridge would have been helpful too so if you wanted to you could take a cooling drink Sadly this was not provided and rendered you having to drink very warm water in the middle of the night I would not recommend staying here in the height of summer as a consequence To get dressed for a wedding or function would be horrendous as you d be sweating so badly As a consequence I d definitely recommend this place as a mid winter hotel   The staff were outstanding The building lovely The location brilliant

Not Applicable   Hotel is in an excellent location close to Greenwich Park and the DLR station The hotel room was great and the bed was extremely comfortable

Pillows weren t very comfortable and the room overlooked the kitchen so the extractor fans were very noisy meaning no sleep   Very good choice for breakfast and freshly cooked
The beds were extremely comfortable The staff were friendly and helpful and the cooked breakfast was great I paid 98 including breakfast which was excellent value Will definitely be staying again

Hotel rooms bathroom a little tired curtains and blinds do not block out light and quite a lot of noise early in the morning   Great location with good transport links and local amenities on the door step Staff extremely friendly and helpful

Hotel is generally well kept and clean but some aspects of the decorations and finishes in the bedrooms particularly the floor and wall tiling in the E Suites need some attention Windows are not all well maintained and are not easy to open and close and let night sound in depending on what side of hotel you are sleeping I appreciate that this building might be a Listed building and the windows cannot be changed due to Planning restrictions which can only be expected in such a location Mattresses a little hard but may be OK for some   Location superb and my favourite in London so far and great to be near the market park waterside etc We had a reasonable view but not the best in the hotel Access to transport excellent Historic Elegant Buildings Class Architectural Heritage all round Lots to see for visitors Hotel facilities we used were good Rooms are good comfortable size and well appointed generally all rooms have En Suite I guess Staff pleasant friendly willing and accommodating Breakfasts great Car parking really good Would recommend hotel

Wedding reception disco being held in the function room below bedroom Would have beneficial to have been informed that it was taking place when checking in   Idea location for the O2

Issue with booking nothing that was the fault of hotel and so sorted by hotel so a thank you   I stay here regularly good value and ease for parking Location great and easy for tube and good food Staff very pleasant

Very hard mattress Afternoon tea was a little overpriced  Friendly Staff Nice Big Room Clean Up to Date Bathroom with very powerful shower Nice bar area Excellent Location and Close to the O2 We had a very warm welcome from the staff at Devonport House they listened to our request to be away from the function room and bought up lovely decorated cakes wishing us a happy anniversary They were also extremely helpful and always smiled The location of the hotel is great and right next to a lovely park and its easy to get into central London by DLR or by the London Clipper Also a nice change for many hotels the shower was fantastic so powerful

For the price should have included breakfast also awoke covered in around 8 ladybirds on my body even though i kept windows all closed i developed a rash due to an elergic reaction  The location and the room

Access to a terrace would have been nice   Basic room category equally includes a very well designed room Going up a category is only worth it for the view and more space to move around in the room We tried a night in each Very friendly staff felt more genuine than in some other hotels in that category Great breakfast buffet caters abundantly for lactose free guests The breakfast room which is the bar at night is beautiful like a very nice cafe

Very nice hotel very well located at walking distance from the Museums and the Hofburg Staff was very pleasant and caring Overall very nice experience and would recommend the Altstadt hotel to family and friends

Toilet Jr Suite No 67 had somehow the smell of cigarette smoke The hotel is entirely non smoking so it was very odd One drawer instead of flat shelf would have been convenient for the same room   Every time I stay here I m quite impressed by friendly and personal touch of services offered It has not changed since my first stay for more than 15 years ago and despite changes of personnel You can feel every staff does enjoy working for the hotel and guests Truly amazing The breakfast rooms were temporarily located on the ground level until the end of March due to renovation Having buffet breakfast at Altstadt Vienna is definitely one of many reasons why I keep coming back to this beautiful city Its comfortable and relaxing atmosphere great variety of tea leaves I prefer tea to coffee for breakfast bread jams and cold cuts always made me late for setting out to the day s first destination This time I particularly enjoyed pear juice In the late afternoon you can enjoy delicious cake and tea at the same place At least I had five different homemade cakes during my stay and they were all really tasty Speaking of the rooms I stayed at one of Jr Suite which is 3 month old after renovation and one classic double room I loved its high ceiling warm colours of curtains and cushions contrasting bright blue sofa of the Jr Suite From the past experiences I was a bit skeptic about waterproof function of glass door of the separate shower booth but it was needless fear One might feel uncomfortable as the outside of closet and bathroom doors are all covered with mirrors You can look away though In a classic double room a large painting was hung on the wall It was a nice change from a colourful interior to a subdued one It is as comfortable as in your own room yet with much more sophistication That s what I really love about this hotel I d really love to get back there like yesterday

Nothing all perfect  Everything about the Hotel Altstadt was excellent staff food room information advice about local places to eat in the evening all wonderful Over the last 30 years I have travelled a lot and have stayed in some great hotels but the Hotel Altstadt is the best

First of all the breakfast is very poor We arrived and they told us that they upgraded our suit the room was scary and old fashioned we asked to change the suit they offered an upgrade on 20 night and said it s a competitive price looks like their system didn t accept that and charged us on 30 per night not a big deal on the 10 but that what happened this hotel is over expensive   Well a couple of cool stuff there like free tea and water with mint staff did a wonderful job not bad cleaning too

Room structure bathroom door in front of window it makes you feeling you are outside Difficult to be two adults in this bedroom Bed in front of windows you still feel outside not enough light near mirror in bathroom Windows Stores far from your arms No light nearby mirror to make up or shaving even next to the closet Bed too hard But we asked for solution and they found one Stairs are not heated you feel cold and outside before arriving to the lift Very cold each morning to pass through the way in to go to the breakfast room   The sightseeing from the bedroom Nespresso in bedroom The hall The location near museum quartier Kindness of staff Everything looks brand new
Very friendly and helpful service from the staff The hotel has lots of fun and quirky touches and breakfast was amazing It s located in the heart of the gallery district in downtown Vienna

No complaints We had a fantastic stay at the Hotel Altstadt   The bed was amazingly comfortable the comfort floor heating in the bathroom added that wonderful extra touch Our breakfast and evening drinks in the lounge were simply perfect

The property itself is unique and beautiful The staff were fantastic and always available to help The location of the property is perfect only a 5 minute walk to the museum district and 10mins to the City Hall and Opera

There was a coffee maker in the room but a kettle to make tea would have been preferred   Super helpful staff great breakfasts reasonably priced bar drinks and snacks yummy cakes and tea every afternoon quiet hotel yet close to centre cool decor

Absolutely wonderful hotel We were there for our honeymoon but right from the moment we stepped into reception before they d even established who we were we were made to feel special The room was incredible and the breakfasts were excellent with different special dishes cooked to order every day and a huge array of breads meats cheeses and cereals to choose from The cake and tea available every afternoon was the icing on top if you ll forgive the pun

On our last morning we were unable to take a shower no hot water no heating Not good   Incrediblt good breakfast and the offer of cake time between 4pm and 6 pm each day Very comfortable bed large bottles of Malin and Goettz toiletries

The bed was too hard for us The staff did try to help by providing a mattress topper but it was still hard  The breakfast was A1 excellent healthy and very generous We liked that it was included in the price as was the afternoon tea with a new cake every day
Loved it all maybe a bit pricey   Large comfortable room Large bathroom with big bath and separate shower Superb breakfast Interesting artwork Lovely helpful staff

Really comfortable rooms immaculately kept The staff went out of their way to make our stay as enjoyable as possible As we were on our honeymoon we had complimentary drinks a Polaroid taken for us to keep a congratulatory card in the room Taxis restaurants anything we needed was booked for us The location was walking distance to all the main attractions yet had a really local non tourist feel to it Everything was so relaxed and comfortable We felt like we were amongst friends The breakfast was amazing with carefully selected ingredients there was a choice of a different local menu each day as well as a continental breakfast and prosecco And of course tea coffee and juices In the afternoon there was free tea and cake in the salon By far the best hotel breakfast offered We will definitely be returning one day

Nothing could have been improved perfect stay   We were 4 friends in the XL suite a 2 bed apartment style room with large lounge very comfortable and spacious staff were absolutely brilliant in every respect breakfasts were great and it is only a 15 min stroll to the Hofburg It s in a nice area with a variety of different and unusual shops and restaurants I cannot recommend the Altstadt highly enough

The hotel and staff were exceptionally warm and welcome The interesting contemporary art and individualized decor was an added plus Breakfast was delicious as was afternoon cake and coffee The hotel is well located near the historic center of Vienna Truly an exceptional hotel

Although we had a very large bathroom the tub had a hand held shower which was difficult to use It was the only minor drawback in our stay   Great location very friendly and helpful staff We had a very large well decorated room The breakfast was wonderful

Internet connections could have been better   One of my favorite hotels anywhere in the world Would come back to Vienna just to stay here again The staff location service elegance of the furnishings and overall ambience are all 5 stars It just gets better and better as the years go by like a fine wine

Glass doors in the bathroom I know it s quirky but I would have liked more privacy   Everything the attention to detail making you feel welcome from the moment you set foot in this hotel breakfast is beautiful and such a great service

It was perfect   The location was perfect for walking into the center of the city The breakfast was amazing Loved the vitamin shot you received with breakfast The free afternoon tea with cake was heaven Helpful staff arranged airport taxis and ran out our boarding cards We could not have chosen better

Though small he hotel has a bit of an odd and sprawing layout Our rooms were far down a series of labyrinthine halls separated by heavy fire doors While our suite was large bright and pleasant the extra double room we booked was quite dark opening onto a lite shaft with no other window and so small it barely accommodated more than our bed   Pleasant little hotel with friendly and welcoming staff Some interesting and eclectic pieces of art here and there Wonderful breakfast in a lovely salon Terrific location in a lively and interesting part of town Reasonable value Suggest booking one of the suites which are large and comfortable

no gym but that is uber picky   I thought the staff was extremely friendly they made me a breakfast sandwich at 4 30 AM to make sure I had breakfast for my flight The area was super hip and you are not far away from the key sites

No a c It was warm   Welcoming staff happy to help The location in the trendy 7th district is a good 25 minute walk from the major attractions but has some great restaurants and shopping near by Grewt breakfast Loved the Malin and Goetz beauty products

From the beginning the staff went out of their way to help with maps suggestions and reservations On several occasions we had to be ready before the breakfast was open but they accommodated our needs and served is earlier The hotel is close to most museums and public transportation areas
The hotel is beautifully furnished Near underground station fairly centrally located Staff very friendly Breakfast was amazing Afternoon tea and cake a bonus

location is a bit far from the center and so is the U bahn elevators are old and slow  Very unique hotel Staff is very helpful and friendly the hotel is a very old building that was renovated very nicely preserving the original atmosphere each bed and piece of furniture is a work of art

It s difficult to be critical but if I have to be picky the orange juice wasn t fresh squeezed   Very friendly and helpful staff A quiet location Delicious breakfast cereals The bed was very comfy All the local recommended restaurants were good and the Wiener was particularly good
There was a construction noise this time in the next apartment   Everything It is a perfect hotel We have been here a couple times and enjoyed it very much

Perfect Place Wonderful Staff  We loved our stay at the Altstadt Beautiful Place with incredibly kind and helpful staff Highly recommend this wonderful hotel which is centrally located and very close walk to museum square

Never seen anything like that The Altstadt combines excellent architecture artwork and cuisine breakfast afternoon tea with a friendly atmosphere and open minded staff A symphony of hospitality and style
The hotel was walking distance to so many places Art galleries museums palaces Loved the hotel and would definitely stay again Also loved the salon

Breakfast was excellent with wide variety of choices and some food was available for those with early flights Staff was very attentive and helpful Rooms were modern and large Historic hotel

Nothing I can t think of anything we could find fault with   The room was great and the breakfast was beyond our expectation Everyone we dealt with at the front desk or restaurant couldn t have been nicer or more helpful One of the best hotel experiences we have ever had

Wi fi was okay but the web access restricted the accessibility of loading photos from my camera so I would have preferred direct accessibility  Staff in reception and restaurants were extremely helpful and friendly The recommendations for nearby eating options were sublime
Wow what an excellent boutique hotel Beautifully furnished and decorated Staff are very attentive and welcoming Wonderful breakfast buffet THE place to stay when in Vienna

There is limited option for vegetarian people in the breakfast and I suggest that the hotel starts serving some hot potato items like hashbrown for breakfast   We were 2 couples staying at this wonderful property in May 2016 On reception Elena was there to welcome us and was very helpful and polite We got a free upgrade to white Suite and Camila Suite which were both very good The salon room in the property is very cozy and comfortable We really enjoyed the home made cake and tea in the evenings All in all a wonderful experience and would definitely recommend it

Nothing   It was all you could ask for in a city hotel Great location with easy access to city centre public transport and restaurants Lovely building and delightful rooms Very friendly staff both at reception and the ladies who worked hard to service the rooms Breakfasts superb

It is not fair to criticise but the lack of privacy between bedroom bathroom and toilet would be an issue if my particular room was used by a couple   The location is close to the centre without being in the centre The five minute stroll to the Museum Quarter is very pleasant and the route can be varied each time External appearances are not impressive but wait until you go up to the reception on the first floor and then wow Without exception all the staff are so friendly polite and helpful My room was listed as a Business single so I was surprised by how spacious it was with a king size bed The unique design of the room was total luxury and comfort I could not fault it Breakfast was everything that I had read in other reviews superb choice and beautiful surroundings with tables in three separate rooms all with original art on the walls If you return from sightseeing in time for free tea and cake it is a very civilised way to wind down after a day in the city There are several restaurants in easy walking distance from the hotel Public transport in Vienna is so easy to use as the trams buses and metro all run frequently and you never have long to wait I bought the weekly ticket which was bizarrely cheaper than the 3 day ticket and could be used on all modes of transport except the sightseeing buses This was one of the best city breaks I have ever had

Room was a little bit warm We opened the windows to take care of that nothing major  The exceptional care and attention of the staff uniqueness of the hotel rooms and feel breakfast was spoiled for choice tea facilities in the room the complimentary afternoon snack location and proximity to some attractions and metro the parting gift and the efficient service We left something behind in the room and the hotel was more than kind enough to mail it to us simply exceptional Will definitely be back on my next trip to Vienna

We were not that happy with the deluxe double room we received since it had no view and we were not comfortable with having the toilet and bath set within the room and merely separated by glass walls and therefore not ensuring the proper intimacy we are not that avantgarde maybe other customers are ok instead by luck we happened to see the opposite room that was cosy and what we were looking for and available and we moved into it although it was a classic double room and not a deluxe Therefore we had a very good and comfortable stay Otherwise we would not have been happy   The room was amazing high ceiling very spacious large desk Nespresso machine with refill every day comfortable bed excellent breakfast the restaurant rooms since there are few and with different design concepts

parking situation near hotel not possible even for short time parking at arrival parking garage 5 min walk ok but when the weather is not fine this is not comfortable   Good atmosphere friendly staff excellent breakfast walking distances to all important attractions

If i could have received a later check out however the hotel it seems was fully booked  I was able to check in early after a long flight so that was excellent The Hotel was in a good location just walking distance from down town Many restaurants nearby as well
